homepage.heroSubline: Reliable electrical solutions for homes and businesses across the Twin Cities. Licensed, insured, and ready to tackle any project, big or small.
aboutText: J-Sim Electric Inc. started with a simple mission: to provide reliable, high-quality electrical services to the Minneapolis community. Founded by John Simonson, a third-generation electrician, we've grown from a small family operation to a trusted name in residential and commercial electrical work.

Our approach is straightforward: honest assessments, transparent pricing, and meticulous workmanship. We understand the unique electrical challenges posed by Minneapolis' climate and older housing stock. From ice dam prevention systems to knob-and-tube wiring replacements, we've seen it all and know how to fix it right.

We're proud to be a part of the Minneapolis community. We actively support local initiatives and prioritize hiring local talent. When you choose J-Sim Electric, you're not just getting an electrician; you're supporting a local business committed to the city's growth and well-being.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Minneapolis' unique electrical needs, from historic homes to modern condos.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees or surprise charges. We provide clear, detailed estimates before any work begins.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: Electrical emergencies don't wait. We're available around the clock to handle urgent situations.

valueProps.title: Licensed & Insured
valueProps.description: Peace of mind knowing your project is handled by qualified professionals with full liability coverage.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free estimate for your electrical needs. Call now to schedule a consultation.

services.name: Residential Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive electrical solutions for Minneapolis homes, ensuring safety and efficiency.
services.description:
From wiring upgrades in historic Craftsman homes in South Minneapolis to installing modern lighting in North Loop condos, we handle all residential electrical needs. We understand the challenges of older homes, including outdated wiring, insufficient outlets, and potential safety hazards. Our services include electrical panel upgrades, lighting installations (indoor and outdoor), outlet and switch replacements, whole-house rewiring, surge protection, and troubleshooting electrical issues. We also specialize in energy-efficient solutions, helping you reduce your carbon footprint and lower your energy bills. 

We pride ourselves on our attention to detail and commitment to safety. All our work is performed to code and rigorously inspected. We'll work with you to design electrical systems that meet your specific needs and budget, ensuring your home is safe, functional, and comfortable. Whether you're renovating, remodeling, or simply need a minor repair, J-Sim Electric is here to help.
process: Step 1: Initial Consultation - We discuss your project and assess your needs.
Step 2: Detailed Estimate - We provide a clear, upfront estimate with no hidden fees.
Step 3: Professional Installation - Our licensed electricians perform the work to code.
Step 4: Final Inspection - We ensure everything is working properly and meets your satisfaction.
benefits: Enhanced safety and reliability of your home's electrical system
Increased energy efficiency and lower utility bills
Improved functionality and convenience with modern electrical upgrades
Peace of mind knowing your home is wired by qualified professionals

faq.question: How often should I have my electrical panel inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend an electrical panel inspection every 3-5 years, especially in older homes with outdated panels. Regular inspections can identify potential problems before they become major hazards.

faq.question: What are the signs that my home needs rewiring?
faq.answer: Common signs include flickering lights, frequently tripping breakers, and warm or discolored outlets. If you notice any of these issues, contact us for an inspection.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency electrical services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency electrical services in Minneapolis. Call us anytime for immediate assistance with urgent electrical problems.

services.name: Commercial Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Reliable electrical solutions for Minneapolis businesses, minimizing downtime and maximizing efficiency.
services.description:
J-Sim Electric Inc. provides comprehensive electrical services for businesses of all sizes in Minneapolis. From small retail shops in Uptown to large office buildings downtown, we understand the unique electrical demands of commercial properties. Our services include electrical system design and installation, lighting upgrades, data cabling, emergency backup systems, and routine maintenance. We also specialize in energy-efficient solutions to help businesses reduce their operating costs and improve their bottom line. 

We minimize downtime and ensure business continuity, understanding that electrical problems can disrupt operations. We work closely with business owners and property managers to develop customized solutions that meet their specific needs and budget. Our team is experienced in working in a variety of commercial settings, including restaurants, retail stores, offices, and industrial facilities. We prioritize safety and compliance, ensuring all work is performed to code and meets industry standards.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment - We evaluate your electrical needs and existing infrastructure.
Step 2: Custom Design - We develop a tailored electrical plan to meet your business requirements.
Step 3: Professional Installation - Our licensed electricians execute the plan efficiently and safely.
Step 4: Ongoing Support - We provide maintenance and support to keep your electrical systems running smoothly.
benefits: Reduced downtime and improved business continuity
Lower energy costs and increased efficiency
Enhanced safety and compliance with industry standards
Reliable electrical systems that support your business growth

faq.question: Do you offer electrical maintenance contracts for businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer customized electrical maintenance contracts to help businesses prevent costly downtime and ensure the reliability of their electrical systems. Contact us for details.

faq.question: Can you help with energy-efficient lighting upgrades?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We specialize in helping businesses switch to energy-efficient LED lighting, which can significantly reduce energy consumption and lower utility bills.

faq.question: What types of businesses do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve a wide range of businesses in Minneapolis, including retail stores, restaurants, offices, industrial facilities, and more.

services.name: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel for improved safety and increased capacity in your Minneapolis home.
services.description:
Is your electrical panel outdated, overloaded, or showing signs of wear? An electrical panel upgrade is essential for ensuring the safety and reliability of your home's electrical system. Many older homes in Minneapolis, especially those in neighborhoods like Southwest Minneapolis, have insufficient electrical capacity to handle modern appliances and electronics. Upgrading your panel can prevent overloaded circuits, tripped breakers, and potential fire hazards. 

We assess your current electrical load and recommend the appropriate panel size to meet your needs. Our services include removing the old panel, installing a new panel with increased capacity, and ensuring all wiring is up to code. We also offer surge protection to safeguard your valuable electronics from power surges. We handle all necessary permits and inspections, making the process hassle-free for you. Don't wait until a problem occurs. Upgrade your electrical panel today for peace of mind and a safer home.
process: Step 1: Load Calculation - We determine your current electrical load and future needs.
Step 2: Panel Selection - We recommend the appropriate panel size and features.
Step 3: Professional Installation - Our licensed electricians install the new panel safely and efficiently.
Step 4: Inspection and Certification - We ensure the installation meets all code requirements.
benefits: Increased electrical capacity to handle modern appliances and electronics
Improved safety and reduced risk of electrical fires
Prevention of overloaded circuits and tripped breakers
Protection of your valuable electronics from power surges

faq.question: How do I know if my electrical panel needs to be upgraded?
faq.answer: Common signs include frequently tripping breakers, flickering lights, and the presence of a fuse box instead of a circuit breaker panel. If you experience any of these issues, contact us for an inspection.

faq.question: How long does an electrical panel upgrade take?
faq.answer: A typical electrical panel upgrade can be completed in one day, minimizing disruption to your home.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for an electrical panel upgrade?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is required for an electrical panel upgrade in Minneapolis. We handle all necessary permits and inspections.

services.name: Lighting Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhance your home or business with professional lighting installation services in Minneapolis.
services.description:
Proper lighting can transform a space, enhancing its ambiance, functionality, and energy efficiency. J-Sim Electric Inc. offers comprehensive lighting installation services for homes and businesses in Minneapolis. Whether you're looking to add recessed lighting to your kitchen, install landscape lighting to highlight your home's features, or upgrade your office lighting to energy-efficient LEDs, we have the expertise to handle any project. 

We help you design a lighting plan that meets your specific needs and aesthetic preferences. Our services include recessed lighting, track lighting, pendant lighting, chandelier installation, outdoor lighting, and smart lighting systems. We also specialize in energy-efficient lighting solutions, helping you reduce your energy consumption and lower your utility bills. We prioritize safety and code compliance, ensuring all installations are performed to the highest standards. Let us illuminate your space with professional lighting solutions.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation - We discuss your lighting goals and preferences.
Step 2: Lighting Plan Development - We create a customized lighting plan to meet your needs.
Step 3: Professional Installation - Our licensed electricians install the lighting fixtures safely and efficiently.
Step 4: Final Adjustments - We ensure the lighting is properly adjusted and meets your satisfaction.
benefits: Enhanced ambiance and functionality of your space
Increased energy efficiency and lower utility bills
Improved safety and security with proper lighting
Customized lighting solutions to meet your specific needs

faq.question: What are the benefits of switching to LED lighting?
faq.answer: LED lighting is significantly more energy-efficient than traditional lighting, lasting much longer and consuming far less energy. This translates to lower utility bills and reduced maintenance costs.

faq.question: Can you install smart lighting systems?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in installing smart lighting systems that allow you to control your lighting remotely and create customized lighting scenes.

faq.question: Do you offer outdoor lighting installation?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a wide range of outdoor lighting solutions, including landscape lighting, security lighting, and patio lighting.

services.name: Electrical Repairs
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable electrical repairs for Minneapolis homes and businesses.
services.description:
Electrical problems can be frustrating and potentially dangerous. J-Sim Electric Inc. provides prompt and reliable electrical repair services for homes and businesses in Minneapolis. From flickering lights to power outages, we diagnose and fix electrical issues quickly and efficiently. Our experienced electricians are equipped with the latest tools and technology to handle any repair, big or small. 

We prioritize safety and code compliance, ensuring all repairs are performed to the highest standards. Our services include troubleshooting electrical problems, repairing faulty wiring, replacing damaged outlets and switches, and fixing malfunctioning appliances. We also offer 24/7 emergency repair services for urgent electrical issues. Don't risk your safety by attempting to fix electrical problems yourself. Call J-Sim Electric for fast and reliable electrical repairs.
process: Step 1: Problem Diagnosis - We identify the source of the electrical problem.
Step 2: Repair Plan Development - We create a plan to fix the issue efficiently and safely.
Step 3: Professional Repair - Our licensed electricians perform the repair to code.
Step 4: Testing and Verification - We ensure the repair is successful and the system is working properly.
benefits: Fast and reliable solutions to electrical problems
Improved safety and reduced risk of electrical hazards
Prevention of further damage to your electrical system
Peace of mind knowing your electrical system is in good hands

faq.question: What should I do if I experience a power outage?
faq.answer: Check your circuit breaker panel to see if a breaker has tripped. If so, reset the breaker. If the power outage persists, contact us for assistance.

faq.question: How can I prevent electrical fires?
faq.answer: Avoid overloading circuits, use surge protectors, and have your electrical system inspected regularly. If you notice any signs of electrical problems, contact us immediately.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency electrical repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency electrical repair services in Minneapolis. Call us anytime for immediate assistance with urgent electrical problems.

services.name: Surge Protection
services.shortDescription: Protect your electronics from damaging power surges with our surge protection services in Minneapolis.
services.description:
Power surges can damage or destroy your valuable electronics, costing you thousands of dollars in replacements. J-Sim Electric Inc. offers comprehensive surge protection services for homes and businesses in Minneapolis. We install whole-house surge protectors that safeguard your entire electrical system from power surges caused by lightning, power outages, or internal electrical fluctuations. 

We assess your specific needs and recommend the appropriate surge protection solution for your home or business. We also offer point-of-use surge protectors for individual appliances and electronics. Our services include installing surge protectors, testing the system, and ensuring it is properly grounded. Don't wait until it's too late. Protect your electronics with professional surge protection services from J-Sim Electric.
process: Step 1: Risk Assessment - We evaluate your surge protection needs.
Step 2: Solution Recommendation - We recommend the appropriate surge protection system.
Step 3: Professional Installation - Our licensed electricians install the surge protection devices.
Step 4: Testing and Verification - We ensure the system is working properly and protecting your electronics.
benefits: Protection of your valuable electronics from power surges
Prevention of costly damage and replacements
Increased lifespan of your electronic devices
Peace of mind knowing your electrical system is protected

faq.question: What is a power surge?
faq.answer: A power surge is a sudden increase in voltage that can damage or destroy electronic devices.

faq.question: How does a surge protector work?
faq.answer: A surge protector diverts excess voltage away from your electronic devices, protecting them from damage.

faq.question: Do I need a whole-house surge protector?
faq.answer: A whole-house surge protector provides comprehensive protection for your entire electrical system and is highly recommended.

serviceAreas.content:
J-Sim Electric Inc. is proud to serve the historic city of St. Paul, Minnesota. From the elegant Victorian-era homes lining Summit Avenue to the diverse neighborhoods throughout the city, we provide comprehensive electrical services tailored to the unique needs of St. Paul residents and businesses. We understand the importance of preserving the architectural integrity of older homes while ensuring modern electrical safety and efficiency.

Our experienced electricians are equipped to handle everything from knob-and-tube wiring upgrades in historic properties to installing energy-efficient lighting solutions in contemporary spaces. We are committed to providing reliable, high-quality electrical services to keep your home or business running smoothly, even during the extreme cold winters that St. Paul experiences.
serviceAreas.localContext: We understand St. Paul's blend of historic charm and modern living, offering electrical solutions that respect the city's heritage while meeting current needs.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: J-Sim Electric did an amazing job upgrading our electrical panel. We live in an older home in Linden Hills, and our old panel was definitely not up to code. They were professional, efficient, and explained everything clearly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We hired J-Sim Electric to install recessed lighting in our kitchen. The electrician was on time, courteous, and did a great job. The new lighting looks fantastic! One of the lights was slightly off alignment and they came back the very next day to fix it. Great service.

reviews.name: Emily S.
reviews.text: We had a major electrical issue in our North Loop condo. Our power went out in the middle of the night, and J-Sim Electric was there within an hour. They quickly diagnosed the problem and fixed it, saving us from a very stressful situation. They're our go-to electricians now!

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: J-Sim Electric has been our electrical contractor for years. They are reliable, professional, and always do a great job. We've used them for everything from installing new outlets to upgrading our entire electrical system. Highly recommend them for any business.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: We had J-Sim Electric install a whole-house surge protector after a lightning strike damaged several of our appliances. They were very knowledgeable and efficient. We feel much safer now knowing our electronics are protected.

reviews.name: Brian T.
reviews.text: John and his team are the best! They rewired our entire house after we bought a 1920s Craftsman in Minneapolis. They found some dangerous old wiring and took care of it all. Honest, hard-working and did a great job. I highly recommend them!
